info.title: RAG Proxy for Gemma
info.description:
OpenAI-compatible proxy with hybrid search, reranking, and Gemma LLM.

## Features
- **Chat Completions** — `/v1/chat/completions` (streaming + non-streaming)
- **Hybrid Search** — dense + sparse RRF fusion in Qdrant
- **Reranking** — cross-encoder (MiniLM-L-6-v2)
- **Graph Expansion** — optional Neo4j entity traversal
- **Auth** — JWT + RBAC (admin/expert/user/read-only)
- **Tools** — agentic tool SDK with OpenAPI discovery
- **Model Evolution** — LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning pipeline

## RAG-specific parameters
- `rag_version` — request a specific document version
- `rag_force_refresh` — bypass response cache
- Response extensions: `rag_feedback_id`, `rag_confidence`, `rag_sources`

get.description: Return list of available models.

Expose Prometheus metrics in OpenMetrics text format.

Returns:
    Response containing all registered counters, histograms, and gauges
    in Prometheus exposition format.
Check proxy and dependency health.
Liveness probe — returns 200 if the process is alive.
Readiness probe — checks Qdrant and LLM connectivity.
TLS health check — verifies TLS configuration and certificate status.

post.description:
Register a new user account.

Stores user with bcrypt-hashed password in SQLite.
Rate-limited to prevent abuse: 3 registrations per IP per minute.

Authenticate user and return a token pair (access + refresh).

Checks against SQLite user database (with bcrypt password verification).
Legacy AUTH_VALID_USERS env var is auto-migrated on first startup.
When AD_ENABLED=true, also attempts LDAP bind before falling back to local.

Exchange a refresh token (or valid access token) for a new token pair.

Backward-compatible: tries refresh token first. Falls back to validating
as an access token for old clients that don't have refresh tokens yet.
On access token validation, issues a full token pair (upgrade path).

Logout: revoke refresh tokens and optionally blacklist the current access token.

When all_sessions=true, revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated user.
When refresh_token is provided, revokes only that specific token.

get.description: Return the current authenticated user's context.

post.description:
Upload a file to MinIO storage.

The file is stored with a UUID-based key under the ``uploads/`` prefix.
Original filename and content type are preserved as metadata.

get.description:
List uploaded files.

Args:
    prefix: Optional key prefix to filter results (e.g. ``uploads/``).

Download a file from storage.

Returns the file content as a streaming response.

Generate a presigned download URL for a file.

Args:
    file_id: The file identifier (object key).
    expiration: URL expiration in seconds (default: 3600, max: 604800).
Get metadata for a specific file.

delete.description:
Delete a file from storage.

Requires EXPERT role or above.

get.description: List available tools with optional filters. RBAC: visibility-filtered by user role.

schema.title: Response List Tools V1 Tools Get

get.description: Get a single tool's details by name. Never exposes handler code.

schema.title: Response Get Tool V1 Tools  Name  Get

post.description: Submit feedback on a RAG response.

get.description:
Serve the embeddable RAG chat widget HTML page.

The widget connects to /v1/chat/completions via SSE streaming.
Access control: WIDGET_ENABLED config flag; RBAC: Role.USER when AUTH_ENABLED.
Serve the standalone RAG chat widget JavaScript. Can be embedded in any page:

post.description:
Trigger model warm-up (admin only).

Runs embedder, reranker, and LLM warmup to pre-load models into memory.
Uses graceful degradation: each component failure is logged, not fatal.
The require_role(Role.ADMIN) dependency enforces admin-level access.

Trigger a model training job (admin only).

Launches an async training job and returns immediately with a job_id.
Use GET /v1/admin/models/status/{job_id} to poll for completion.

get.description: Check training job status (admin only).
List all registered models with versions and stages (admin only).

post.description: Promote a model version through staging -> canary -> production (admin only).
Rollback to previous production version (admin only).

Run eval gate on model metrics (admin only).

Default thresholds: accuracy >= 0.90, weighted_f1 >= 0.85, mrr >= 0.70.

Set canary traffic split for a model (admin only).

Sets the fraction of traffic routed to the canary version.
0.0 = all traffic to stable, 1.0 = all traffic to canary.

get.description: Get current canary deployment status and metrics (admin only).

post.description: Create a new knowledge base with its own Qdrant collection.

get.description: List all knowledge bases.
Get a knowledge base by ID.

delete.description: Delete a knowledge base (soft delete by default).

schema.title: Response Delete Knowledge Base V1 Admin Kb  Kb Id  Delete
